summary: Opus-grinds / Fable-scalpel wheel: Opus does ALL hard work (read, search, build, fix, measure) toward a benchmark target; Fable is called ONCE per round for a precise deep-think gate only — never for hard read/search. Loops until Fable gates it top.

phases.title: Work
phases.detail: Opus: read the named files, apply the next concrete step, exercise it, commit, MEASURE the benchmark

phases.title: Gate
phases.detail: Fable: precise deep-think on the diff + measurement — correct? faithfulness-safe? top yet? exact next step
